steps.title: Identify the barrier Text 2 describes
steps.content: Text 2 argues that financial security determines who becomes a published poet because practicing extensively requires time unavailable to full-time workers.

steps.title: Find Lorde's counter in the choices
steps.content: Lorde would respond by pointing out that people can gain experience writing poetry while working full-time jobs—her position directly contradicts Text 2's premise that time constraints prevent this. The other three either address unrelated topics, contradict her actual claim, or invert the relationship she describes. That matches choice C — C is correct.
